title: mirabilis laevis var. crassifolia
intro: Mirabilis laevis var. crassifolia, also known as the thick-leaved four o'clock, is a variety of the four o'clock plant, a flowering species in the four o'clock family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Mirabilis laevis var. crassifolia include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and treating wounds. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or salve, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various health issues.
